value: Traefik v3 (tested up to v3.6.5) only supports a SINGLE Docker provider endpoint. Cannot point at multiple Docker daemons (e.g. dockerhost + diskstation) simultaneously. For multi-host setups, traefik-kop + Redis remains the best approach. The stale container ID problem with network_mode: service:gluetun is mitigated by the existing cron workaround (update-gluetun-stack.sh) and boot script (compose-up.sh). Moving labels to Gluetun would fix it permanently but is unnecessary complexity.
